properties.description: Detects potential data exfiltration from Azure Blob Storage, file shares, or databases including large downloads, unusual access patterns, access from foreign IPs to sensitive storage, or bulk export operations. MITRE ATT&CK: T1530 - Data from Cloud Storage Object, T1537 - Transfer Data to Cloud Account.
properties.query:
let exfilThresholdMB = 500;
let suspiciousCountries = dynamic(["RU", "CN", "KP", "IR", "SY"]);
// Blob storage large downloads
let blobExfil = StorageBlobLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where OperationName =~ "GetBlob"
    | where ResponseBodySize > (exfilThresholdMB * 1024 * 1024)
    | extend
        CallerIP    = tostring(CallerIpAddress),
        AccountName = tostring(AccountName),
        Container   = tostring(Uri)
    | summarize
        TotalBytes  = sum(ResponseBodySize),
        BlobCount   = count(),
        FirstSeen   = min(TimeGenerated)
        by CallerIP, AccountName, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
    | extend
        ThreatType  = "BLOB_LARGE_DOWNLOAD",
        TotalMB     = round(TotalBytes / 1048576.0, 1)
    | where TotalMB > exfilThresholdMB
    | project TimeGenerated = FirstSeen, CallerIP, AccountName, ThreatType, TotalMB, BlobCount;
// Azure Storage access from suspicious geographies
let geoExfil = StorageBlobLogs
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where OperationName =~ "GetBlob"
    | extend CallerIP = tostring(CallerIpAddress)
    | evaluate geo_info_from_ip_address(CallerIP)
    | where CountryIso2 in (suspiciousCountries)
    | summarize
        AccessCount = count(),
        TotalBytes  = sum(ResponseBodySize),
        FirstSeen   = min(TimeGenerated)
        by CallerIP, AccountName, CountryIso2, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
    | extend
        ThreatType  = "GEO_SUSPICIOUS_ACCESS",
        TotalMB     = round(TotalBytes / 1048576.0, 1)
    | project TimeGenerated = FirstSeen, CallerIP, AccountName, ThreatType, TotalMB, AccessCount;
// Bulk export from Azure SQL
let sqlExfil = AzureDiagnostics
    | where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
    | where Category == "SQLSecurityAuditEvents"
    | where action_name_s =~ "BULK INSERT" or action_name_s =~ "DBCC"
    | summarize
        QueryCount  = count(),
        FirstSeen   = min(TimeGenerated)
        by client_ip_s, server_instance_name_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
    | where QueryCount >= 5
    | extend
        ThreatType  = "SQL_BULK_EXPORT",
        CallerIP    = client_ip_s,
        AccountName = server_instance_name_s,
        TotalMB     = 0.0
    | project TimeGenerated = FirstSeen, CallerIP, AccountName, ThreatType, TotalMB, BlobCount = QueryCount;
union blobExfil, geoExfil, sqlExfil
| summarize
    ThreatTypes   = make_set(ThreatType),
    TotalMB       = sum(TotalMB),
    EventCount    = count(),
    FirstSeen     = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen      = max(TimeGenerated)
    by CallerIP, AccountName
| extend
    Severity = case(
        TotalMB > 5000,                "CRITICAL",
        TotalMB > 1000,                "HIGH",
        array_length(ThreatTypes) > 1, "HIGH",
        "MEDIUM"
    )
| project
    TimeGenerated = FirstSeen,
    CallerIP,
    AccountName,
    Severity,
    ThreatTypes,
    TotalMB,
    EventCount,
    FirstSeen,
    LastSeen
